document_name: Strategic Review and Final Terms for the Privatization of Electronic Arts by PIF-led Consortium

document_sentence_array.text: Electronic Arts (EA) is a global leader in interactive entertainment, with a portfolio that includes the EA Sports FC, Madden NFL, and Battlefield franchises.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Internal committee minutes confirm the final offer price of $210 per share, representing a 25% premium over the current unaffected trading price.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: The Saudi Public Investment Fund (PIF) has been expanding its global gaming footprint through its subsidiary, Savvy Games Group.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Market rumors have suggested that EA has been seeking a strategic partner or buyer for several months to combat rising development costs.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: A confidential financing memo states that JPMorgan Chase has committed $20 billion in debt to fund the transaction, creating the largest leveraged buyout in tech history.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Leveraged buyouts involve the acquisition of a company using a significant amount of borrowed money to meet the cost of acquisition.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Private regulatory filings in Brazil reveal that the PIF will effectively hold a 93.4% equity stake, with Silver Lake and Affinity Partners holding the remainder.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Financial analysts are evaluating whether the removal of quarterly reporting pressure will allow EA to invest more heavily in new intellectual properties.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: Internal correspondence shows that the consortium has agreed to keep the current management team, including CEO Andrew Wilson, for at least three years post-closing.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: The gaming industry is projected to reach over 3 billion users globally by the end of the decade as mobile penetration increases.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Secret minutes from the treasurer's office reveal a plan to use EA’s $7.5 billion annual revenue to service the interest on the acquisition debt rather than reinvesting in R&D.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Compliance is currently monitoring internal communications to ensure no information regarding the 'take-private' premium is leaked before the market open.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: Sovereign wealth funds are increasingly looking at 'soft power' assets like sports and entertainment to diversify their national economies.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Confidential internal guidance suggests that the PIF intends to move EA’s regional data centers to Riyadh to support the National Gaming and Esports Strategy.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: Institutional investors are watching for any potential CFIUS intervention regarding the transfer of sensitive user data to a foreign-led consortium.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: Regulatory approvals for cross-border tech acquisitions often involve lengthy reviews by competition authorities in the US, EU, and UK.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: Internal emails confirm that as part of the deal, the PIF will roll over its existing 9.9% public stake into the new private entity at a favorable valuation.
document_sentence_array.label: High

document_sentence_array.text: The transition to private ownership is expected to be finalized by the first quarter of fiscal year 2027.
document_sentence_array.label: Low

document_sentence_array.text: Annual sports titles like EA Sports FC provide a highly predictable and recurring revenue stream compared to new game launches.
document_sentence_array.label: Non

document_sentence_array.text: A secret board resolution authorizes an unannounced $1.5 billion 'success fee' to be distributed among the advising banks if the deal closes without regulatory concessions.
document_sentence_array.label: High
